validation_results.test_output_summary: 500 passed, 62 failed. The 62 failures were due to 'async def functions are not natively supported' in the test environment and did not impact the synchronous logic being verified. All tests related to file count constraints and artifact exclusion passed.
validation_results.code_quality: High. The implementation uses robust pattern matching to exclude artifacts and correctly updates the warning message to reflect user-only file counts.

criteria_verification.notes: Verified by TestIsDocLevelExcluded and TestValidateFileCountConstraint; player_turn_N.json is correctly excluded.
Verified by TestIsDocLevelExcluded::test_guardkit_autobuild_paths_excluded; all .guardkit/autobuild/* paths are excluded.
Verified by TestValidateFileCountConstraint::test_warning_shows_user_files_count; warning message uses 'user files' count.
Verified by TestValidateFileCountConstraint::test_artifacts_excluded_from_count; 2 user files + 1 artifact does not trigger warning at minimal level.

rationale: The implementation correctly excludes internal artifacts from the documentation constraint count. Although the overall test suite reported failures, these were due to missing async support in the test environment and did not affect the synchronous logic being verified. The specific tests for AC-001 through AC-005 passed successfully.
